name: Airline — Pre-Booking phase
description: High-stakes industry where motivations should orbit around trip purpose, route confidence, and trade-offs (price vs schedule vs flexibility).

input.businessDescription: International full-service airline operating long-haul and short-haul routes for leisure, business, and family travellers.
input.painPoints: High abandonment in shopping flow when itinerary requires a connection. Loyalty members frustrated by inability to combine miles + cash.

journeyPhase.label: Pre-Booking
journeyPhase.description: Customer is exploring destinations, comparing routes/dates, and shaping intent before committing to a fare.
journeyPhase.trigger: Visits website/app or sees an inspirational ad
